ddls:
CREATE TABLE "firms" (
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firm */,
  "beta_hml" REAL /* Beta value related to HML (High Minus Low) */,
  "beta_mk" REAL /* Beta value related to MK (Market) */,
  "beta_mom" REAL /* Beta value related to MOM (Momentum) */,
  "beta_smb" REAL /* Beta value related to SMB (Small Minus Big) */,
  "firmcode" INTEGER /* Code identifying the firm */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the industry the firm belongs to */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sector the firm belongs to */,
  "logv" REAL /* Log volume of the firm's trading activity */,
  "sigma" REAL /* Volatility of the firm's stock */,
  "skewness" REAL /* Skewness of the firm's stock returns */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region of the firm */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the firm */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering (IPO) date of the firm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firms_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firms_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firms_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the country of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firm related to the performance metric */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric report */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "log_return" REAL /* Logarithmic return of the firm’s stock */,
  "trading_volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the firm's stock */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the firm's stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the firm's stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_firm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firm_id") REFERENCES firms ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role identifier for the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's details were updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
